name: 7qt Clear Storage Bin with Latches - Brightroom™
description:
Step up to the Brightroom™ 7 Quart Clear Latching Storage Bin with Lid and get organized! The clear base and lid allow you to easily view and locate stored contents from any angle. Color-accented latches securely attach the lid to the base, keeping items contained while providing a comfortable grip for easy carrying. The recessed lid design allows storage bins to stack neatly, maximizing vertical storage space. This plastic storage container is perfect for accessories, shoes, keepsakes, and more, helping bring order to closets, bedrooms, and dorm rooms with ease.
Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
